decisions.title: M3-heatmap-plan checkpoint opened
decisions.description: Checkpoint de planejamento heatmap aberto para cadeia commit-driven sem implementação nesta rodada. Escopo: taxonomia de subjects, domínio/core, storage hot/cold, replay determinism e observability.

decisions.title: Heatmap D1/D2/D3 decisions
decisions.description: D1: Heatmap permanece sob root `insights` (sem novo root). D2: `owner_bc=insights`, `producer_bc=insights`, `schema_authority_bc=insights` para `insights.heatmap_snapshot.v1` e `insights.heatmap_delta.v1`. D3: canonical instrument no bus é `BTCUSDT` (uppercase alnum) e WS usa symbol normalizado por canonicalização já existente.
alternatives: Criar root `aggregation` para heatmap (rejeitado: conflita ownership atual no registry).
Manter outputs com placeholders `insights.<heatmap_event>` (rejeitado: regra hard sem TBD).

decisions.title: Cardinality/boundedness policy for heatmap
decisions.description: Buckets explícitos: `price_bucket` (determinístico por tick_size), `size_bucket` (faixas discretas: xs/s/m/l/xl), `time_bucket` (janela fechada por timeframe). Caps: `max_price_buckets_per_window=512`, `max_size_buckets=5`, `max_cells_per_window=2048`, `max_open_windows_per_partition=2` por `(venue,instrument,timeframe)`. Degradação ADR-0013: (1) aumentar bucket_size de preço, (2) reduzir cadence de emissão, (3) top-N cells por intensidade, (4) drop de frame stale com reason `stale_window_drop` e queue overflow com `queue_full`. Idempotency artifact key: `hash(venue,instrument,timeframe,window_start_ts,price_bucket_low,price_bucket_high,size_bucket,seq_max)`.

decisions.title: Heatmap inputs/outputs locked (no TBD)
decisions.description: Inputs canônicos: `marketdata.bookdelta.v1.{venue}.{instrument}` e `marketdata.trade.v1.{venue}.{instrument}`. `marketdata.markprice`/`marketdata.liquidation` ficam fora do heatmap v1. Outputs mínimos: `insights.heatmap_snapshot.v1.{venue}.{instrument}` (draft) e `insights.heatmap_delta.v1.{venue}.{instrument}` (planned), substituindo placeholders `insights.<heatmap_event>` nos docs de contrato.

decisions.title: Commit Chain HEATMAP (C1..C8) with gates/rollback
decisions.description: C1 `docs(contracts): resolve heatmap subjects without placeholders` objetivo: remover TBD e fixar outputs no contrato. arquivos: `docs/contracts/event-bus.md`, `docs/contracts/delivery-ws.md`, `docs/architecture/heatmap.md`. gates: `make docs-check-full`, `make commit-msg-check`. rollback: revert C1. C2 `fix(governance): enforce heatmap subjects in registry and validator tests` objetivo: garantir enforcement de subject contract antes da produção. arquivos: `docs/contracts/subject-registry.yaml`, `scripts/check-registry.sh`, `internal/adapters/jetstream/subject_validation_test.go`. gates: `make docs-check-full`, `make invariants-check`, `make test-unit`. rollback: revert C2. C3 `docs(feature-pack): align heatmap pack contracts and caps` objetivo: sincronizar `.context` sem misturar com `docs/**`. arquivos: `.context/docs/feature-packs/heatmap.md`, `.context/docs/README.md`. gates: `make docs-check-full`. rollback: revert C3. C4 `feat(insights-domain): add heatmap artifact model and invariants` objetivo: criar domínio/core com bounded invariants. arquivos: `internal/core/insights/domain/heatmap_bucket.go`, `internal/core/insights/app/build_heatmap.go`, `internal/core/insights/app/build_heatmap_test.go`. gates: `make invariants-check`, `make test-unit`. rollback: revert C4. C5 `feat(storage): add heatmap hot/cold writers` objetivo: path hot/cold ADR-0006 com idempotent upsert. arquivos: `internal/adapters/storage/timescale/heatmap_writer.go`, `internal/adapters/storage/clickhouse/heatmap_writer.go`, `internal/adapters/storage/heatmap_writer_test.go`. gates: `make invariants-check`, `make test-unit`, `make test-workspace`. rollback: revert C5. C6 `test(replay): add heatmap deterministic golden rebuild` objetivo: garantir rebuild determinístico e hash estável. arquivos: `internal/core/insights/app/build_heatmap_test.go`, `internal/core/insights/app/testdata/heatmap_golden.jsonl`, `cmd/consumer/replay_heatmap_test.go`. gates: `make test-replay-golden`, `make test-workspace`. rollback: revert C6. C7 `test(replay): enforce 50-run byte stability for heatmap artifacts` objetivo: detectar flake não determinístico. arquivos: `internal/core/insights/app/build_heatmap_golden_stability_test.go`, `internal/core/insights/app/testdata/heatmap_golden_output.jsonl`. gates: `make test-replay-golden`, `make test-unit`. rollback: revert C7. C8 `feat(observability): expose heatmap pipeline metrics` objetivo: métricas mínimas de pipeline e drops reasoned. arquivos: `internal/shared/metrics/metrics.go`, `internal/shared/metrics/metrics_test.go`, `internal/core/insights/app/build_heatmap.go`. gates: `make test-unit`, `make test-workspace`, `make invariants-check`. rollback: revert C8.

decisions.title: Gate policy per commit for M3 heatmap
decisions.description: Always por commit: `make commit-msg-check` + gate principal do escopo. Escopo docs/contracts: `make docs-check-full`. Escopo domínio/storage/metrics: `make invariants-check` + `make test-unit`. Escopo replay/envelope/subjects/storage: `make test-replay-golden`. Escopo WS (quando houver): `make test-workspace-race`. Fechamento da chain: `make docs-check-full && make invariants-check && make test-unit && make test-workspace && make test-replay-golden`.

decisions.title: HEATMAP implementation commit chain applied
decisions.description: Commits aplicados: `cf49def` (contracts placeholders), `90c828d` (registry enforcement), `20ac8b5` (.context heatmap pack), `637bb87` (insights domain+builder), `61c93d2`+`b9ba130` (storage hot/cold + idempotency test), `0455695`+`b4ef6ca` (replay golden + 50-run byte stability + replay gate pattern), `ccf1e8f`+`ac449ab` (heatmap observability metrics + hooks), `e607db3` (go.mod tidy).

decisions.title: HEATMAP gates passed
decisions.description: Validação executada e aprovada: `make docs-check-full`, `make invariants-check`, `make test-unit`, `make test-replay-golden`. Replay golden cobre heatmap via `cmd/consumer/replay_heatmap_test.go` (`TestReplayHeatmapGolden1000`, `TestHeatmapReplayByteStable50Runs`).
